epigraph.quote: We walked into Hay & shopped & had icecream. I bought a dress & a red knapsack.

per_stop.quote: Owain Glendower is buried in the church yard, the last Prince of Wales before the Tudors.
we walked along the river & found a beach & some of us swam.
We cycled along Rutland Water path. Tinder was in the bike bag most of the way.
A bit like Cambridge without students & tourists.
We gave her tea from the van in her beautiful garden.
